name: @vllnt/convex-api-keys
description: Convex component for secure API key management — create, validate, revoke, rotate, rate-limit, track usage

scripts.generate:llms:
node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const files=['README.md','src/shared.ts','src/client/types.ts','src/client/index.ts','src/component/schema.ts','src/component/validators.ts','src/component/mutations.ts','src/component/queries.ts','src/test.ts'];let out='# @vllnt/convex-api-keys — Full Source

Auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
';for(const f of files){out+='
---

## '+f+'

';if(f.endsWith('.md')){out+=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')}else{out+='\`\`\`ts
'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')+'\`\`\`'}out+='
'}fs.writeFileSync('llms-full.txt',out)"
scripts.preversion: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build:clean && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm generate:llms
scripts.alpha: npm version prerelease --preid alpha && npm publish --tag alpha && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release: npm version patch && npm publish && git push --follow-tags

author: bntvllnt
